about.title: Know who
about.description1: Duc Tran recently graduated with a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science from Fitchburg State University in Fitchburg, Massachusetts.
about.flex: Duc finished his undergrad with a 3.87/4.0 GPA and completed two software engineering internships along the way.
about.wish: Duc is actively seeking a full-time software engineer position.
about.side: Apart from coding, some other activities that Duc enjoys spending time
about.verse: Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart, as working for the Lord, not for human masters
